_description: Serper.dev Google Search + Maps + Reviews flows
_gotchas: Auth is X-API-KEY header, not Bearer
Maps returns places array, use places[0] for single result
Reviews needs placeId from maps result, NOT a search query
1 credit per search, 4 credits per maps, 10 credits per reviews
gl param for country targeting (us, uk, de, etc.)

_web_search._description: Google web search. Good for discovery, news, finding URLs.
_web_search._curl: curl -s -X POST 'https://google.serper.dev/search' -H 'X-API-KEY: $SERPER_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"q": "site:facebook.com Austin TX live music venues", "num": 20}'
_web_search._tool: serper.sh search --q 'site:facebook.com Austin TX live music venues' --num 20

_maps_search._description: Google Maps place lookup. Returns place details + placeId for reviews.
_maps_search._curl: curl -s -X POST 'https://google.serper.dev/maps' -H 'X-API-KEY: $SERPER_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"q": "Acme Arena Austin TX", "num": 1}'

_reviews._description: Google Reviews for a place. Needs placeId from maps result.

_site_search_pattern._description: Use site: prefix to search within a specific domain. Cheapest way to find pages.
_site_search_pattern._tool: serper.sh search --q 'site:facebook.com Austin TX live music' --num 20

_cost_optimization.discovery: Use search (1 credit) to find URLs first
_cost_optimization.place_details: Use maps (4 credits) only when you need address/phone/rating
_cost_optimization.reviews: Use reviews (10 credits) only for signal validation
